content.full_text:
July 20, 2009

Kent M. Taylor
1295 Descanso St.
San Luis Obispo, CA 93405

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-165

Dear Mr. Taylor:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on July 2, 2009.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Cynthia A. Jones
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
